name: verify_open_ports
description: Open port claims verified with actual nmap/nc probes
expectation: nmap -sV or nc -v executed for each claimed open port

name: verify_service_versions
description: Service version claims verified with banner grabbing
expectation: Actual banner/version string shown from probe, not assumed

name: verify_default_creds
description: Default credential claims verified with actual login attempt
expectation: Actual authentication attempt shown with success/failure output

name: verify_ssl_issues
description: SSL/TLS claims verified with openssl or nmap scripts
expectation: openssl s_client or nmap --script ssl-enum-ciphers output shown

name: verify_protocol_vulns
description: Protocol vulnerability claims verified with specific probes
expectation: Appropriate protocol tool used (smbclient, snmpwalk, etc.) with output

name: false_positive_identification
expectation: Findings that cannot be independently reproduced are marked FALSE_POSITIVE with reason

name: verdict_present
expectation: Output ends with VERDICT: and PASS_RATE: lines
